title: Trading Direkt 2026-06-05 | Avanzas Börsstrateg Elin Benjaminsson med analys, Tobbe med TA
summary_md:
# Trading Direkt 2026-06-05 | Avanzas Börsstrateg Elin Benjaminsson med analys, Tobbe med TA

**Feed**: trading-direkt  
**Published**: 2026-06-05  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Avanza strategist Elin Benjaminsson reads May customer data showing a clear rotation into US tech, AI/semiconductor and emerging-market exposure (Investor, Micron, Nibe most bought; Sivers, banks and Novo Nordisk most sold), with Europe and small-cap funds now being dumped and a 4x jump in US net buying versus Q1. Technical analyst Tobbe Rosén is broadly constructive on equity indices (S&P 500, OMXS30 building a possible ascending triangle) with low volatility and a falling VIX, but turns negative on crypto (Bitcoin and Ethereum breaking down) and most precious metals. The session closes with a market wrap where Broadcom's weak report dragged AI/semis (Micron, Arm), while Blackstone, KKR, Pinterest and a DNB-Carnegie-upgraded SEB outperformed.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 ARJO-B — Arjo | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Long-term falling wedge with positive RSI and Stochastics-MACD divergences; breakouts from falling wedges usually occur upward.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe sees a multi-month falling wedge plus positive momentum divergence forming a potential double/triple bottom. A confirmed break above the falling resistance would target the October 2024 top around 44-45 SEK, but he stresses these are indications, not yet confirmed buy signals.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks below the wedge support
- if it fails to break above the falling upper resistance

> *"vi vet ju att utbrott från fallande kilar i de allra flesta fall sker norrut"*

---

### 🟠 AZN — AstraZeneca | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Totalsupp reversal, MR200 icebreak and a pass above the standard line; price finding footing at support.

#### Reasoning

After falling below a significant low, AstraZeneca printed a totalsupp reversal handing buyers a mental edge, then an MR200 icebreak and standard-line cross. Tobbe is slightly positive and wants a buy cross plus a zero-zone breakout to confirm.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price falls back below the MR200
- if no buy-signal cross / zero-zone breakout materialises

> *"AstraZeneca ser ut att hitta lite fotfäste här nere kring de här stödnivåerna"*

---

### 🟠 CAMX — Camurus | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

Long downtrend but stabilising with a higher low and tightening triangle-like contraction; Stochastics-MACD coiling near zero.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe notes early signs of recovery as buyers absorb selling and a contraction forms with compressed volatility. Moves out of such tight Stochastics coils tend to be powerful, so he flags it as interesting to monitor for a directional break.

#### Sell Triggers

- if a new lower significant low forms
- if the contraction resolves downward

> *"helt klart intressant att bevaka Camurus och se vad det blir av den här kontraktionen"*

---

### 🔴 CANTA — Cantargia | **SELL** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Extremely oversold (down ~43% in a month) but in a falling trend below FIB 62 with an open gap to fill below.

#### Reasoning

Despite RSI/Stochastics under 20, trend and the manner of the decline dominate: price is below FIB 62 (typically needing a return to base) and closed weakly in a gap that usually fills. Historical snapshots show price lower in 19 of 25 comparable cases a month on, so Tobbe sees more downside.

#### Sell Triggers

- if an extreme-volatility oversold reversal appears
- if price reclaims FIB 62 and the gap level

> *"just nu så pekar den mer neråt än uppåt"*

---

### 🟡 CLAV — Clavister | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Range-bound after a rounded bottom; Stochastics-MACD directionless within its own range.

#### Reasoning

Price has chopped within a range up to ~35 after a nice rounded bottom. With momentum lacking steerage, Tobbe stays neutral to marginally positive and warns of continued choppy, whippy moves while the range holds.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks down out of the range

> *"jag är neutral. Kanske lite lite svagt positiv till klavister men att det är stor risk då för fortsatta skvalpiga rörelser"*

---

### 🟢 EG7 — Enad Global 7 | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Broke up out of a contraction and is retesting a strong support; price above the 200-day MA in a medium-term rising channel.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe likes that price trades above the 200-day MA and that a historical edge (82 occurrences) favours buyers returning after this kind of weekly pullback within a monthly advance. He judges a continuation pattern at this level buy-worthy, and a reclaimed dip a totalsupp worth acting on.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks below the consolidation/support level and fails to reclaim it same/next day

> *"en fortsättningsformation här kring den här nivån definitivt är köpvärd"*

---

### 🟡 HEXA-B — Hexagon | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Higher lows but stuck just under the 200-day MA; current shape more like a rising wedge, whose breakouts usually go south.

#### Reasoning

Stochastics-MACD points up and there are decent odds the pattern becomes a rising channel toward 95-96 resistance, but for now it resembles a rising wedge (typically resolving downward). Tobbe is neutral to slightly negative until price clears the MR200.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price fails to break above the 200-day MA (MR200)

> *"Jag är neutral till svagt, svagt, svagt negativ till hexagon just precis nu"*

---

### 🟠 ITAB — ITAB Group | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Totalsupp reversal lifted price to ~16 SEK; appears to be rounding off the prior downturn with Stochastics-MACD in positive territory.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe sees the stock trying to round off its decline with momentum positive, making him neutral to slightly positive short term. However the longer-term trend is still down, so he remains slightly negative on a longer horizon.

#### Sell Triggers

- if it fails to complete the rounding bottom and resumes the falling trend

> *"neutral till svagt, svagt positiv på kort sikt. Men på lite längre sikt är jag fortfarande lite svagt negativ"*

---

### 🟢 LUMI — Lundin Mining | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 65%

Broke up out of a triangle-like formation with Stochastics-MACD pointing up; positive copper backdrop.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe stays very positive after the triangle breakout and believes in continued gains, with momentum supportive. He flags 300 SEK (a double-zero level) as tough resistance, especially if the stock arrives there overbought.

#### Sell Triggers

- if rejected hard at the 300 SEK resistance
- if price falls back inside the triangle

> *"jag fortfarande mycket Positiv till Lundin Mining och tro på fortsatta uppgångar"*

---

### 🟡 MSFT — Microsoft | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Inverted head-and-shoulders attempt that pulled back below the rising neckline; now testing the standard line and 20-day MA.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe can still discern a short-term rising channel despite a messy look, but with price back under the neckline he is slightly negative for now, flipping to slightly positive only once the neckline is reclaimed.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price fails to pass back above the neckline

> *"Svagt svagt negativ till Microsoft. Kommer svänga över och bli svagt svagt positiv om den här nacklinjen passeras igen"*

---

### 🟠 STE-R — Stora Enso | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Softening the 200-day MA with a tendency to higher lows and Stochastics-MACD above the zero zone, but doji-on-doji uncertainty.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe sees an interesting setup but acknowledged uncertainty from repeated dojis with upper wicks. He is slightly negative now yet poised to flip slightly positive if price breaks above the 110-111 SEK level, which could trigger a sharper move.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price fails to break above 110-111 SEK

> *"Bryter den väl upp över den här nivån som vi ser här vid 110-111 kronor. Så kan det ju bli lite åkav"*

---

### 🟢 SEB-A — SEB | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Cited analyst view: DNB Carnegie buy-stamped SEB and raised its target to 222 from 206 SEK.

#### Reasoning

DNB Carnegie expects SEB's international corporate expansion and Baltic presence to drive earnings growth above the sector average and return on equity to recover above 15% from 2027, lifting the target to 222 SEK; the stock rose 2%, the most in OMXS30.

#### Sell Triggers

- if international/Baltic expansion stalls
- if ROE fails to recover above 15% by 2027

> *"i spåren av att banken har köpstämplats av DNB Carnegie"*

---

### 🟢 UNH — UnitedHealth | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Cited analyst view: Bank of America upgraded UnitedHealth to buy from neutral; stock rose 5.1%.

#### Reasoning

Bank of America points to improved healthcare cost trends and a favourable setup into the company's second-quarter report as the basis for upgrading UnitedHealth to buy from neutral.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the Q2 report disappoints
- if healthcare cost trends deteriorate again

> *"Bank of America uppgraderat försäkringsbolaget United Health till köp från neutral"*

---
